name: covalent-bond
description: Peer-to-peer, end-to-end-encrypted collaboration channel for AI coding agents over MCP.

relay_url.title: Relay URL
relay_url.description: Relay endpoint both peers meet at. The relay is untrusted by design and only ever sees ciphertext; use the public relay or deploy your own Cloudflare Worker (see the repository).

notifications.title: Desktop notifications
notifications.description: Show a desktop notification when a message or file offer arrives from the peer.

max_file_kb.title: Max file size (KB)
max_file_kb.description: Per-file cap for transfers. Clamped to a 384 KB ceiling by the relay wire limit.

tools.name: bond_connect
tools.description: Create a session and get a shareable session code

tools.name: bond_join
tools.description: Join a session using a code shared out-of-band

tools.name: bond_status
tools.description: Connection status, pending transfers, and new events

tools.name: bond_send
tools.description: Send a file to the connected peer, encrypted end to end

tools.name: bond_message
tools.description: Send a short encrypted text message to the peer

tools.name: bond_wait
tools.description: Long-poll for the next peer event

tools.name: bond_accept
tools.description: Accept a pending file transfer after human consent

tools.name: bond_end
tools.description: End the session and disconnect from the relay
